text.title: Eloquent Code Examples and Antipatterns
text.summary: Model, repository, query object, and controller wiring examples; plus antipatterns to reject in code review.

example.note: HasUlids for ULID PKs. $with = [] prevents hidden global eager loads. New Attribute::make() syntax only.

antipattern.description: Model::all() on a user-facing endpoint without pagination.
antipattern.reason: Loads the entire table into PHP memory. OOM risk on tables with >10k rows.
All columns become mass-assignable, allowing an attacker to set is_admin, organization_id, or any sensitive field via the API.

antipattern.description: Mixing old getEmailAttribute() accessor and new Attribute::make() for the same attribute on the same model.
antipattern.reason: Produces undefined behavior; old-style accessors silently win in some Laravel versions, causing the new accessor to be ignored.

text.reference: Subagent prompt for full HTTP resource generation
